UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 1
Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Laurel Gardens Apartments is NOT present. No Property manager present.
Attorney Charles Ramsey for the plaintiff.
Defendant Merceded Powell is present.
Attorney Ryan Murphy appearing for defendant in limited scope.

1:53 pm Judge Quidachay speaks to both parties and orders Plaintiff's Counsel to bring client in.
2:30 pm Defendant's Counsel requests to be released. Judge Q comes out and if client is not here by 2:40 pm Defendant's Counsel may go and per suggestion of Plaintff's Counsel he will dismiss the case.
2:40 pm No Appearance by Plaintiff, Counsel to dismiss case and bring a courtesy copy to Dept. 501 tomorrow. Parties released by Judge Q.***

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by Plaintiff. Plaintiff's Counsel to dismiss the case. The trial date of Jan 30, 2017 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
